title: Wynncraft Autoattack
description: Auto Clicker triggered by holding a key (default: R). Attack interval can be checked or configured using /attackinterval (default: 233ms).
body:
Auto Clicker triggered by holding a key (default: R). Attack interval can be checked or configured using /attackinterval (default: 233ms), which is 4.3 cps (super fast attack speed on Wynncraft).

Made for use on Wynncraft, but can be used anywhere. It is recommended to experiment with attack delay to find what works best for you. May vary based on user ping.
